visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens with a high-energy graphic overlay featuring the Costco Wholesale logo, animated fire effects at the bottom, and a cartoon character on the left. A person's hand pushes a metal shopping cart filled with items through a brightly lit warehouse aisle with high industrial ceilings and long rows of shelving. (2) A transition leads into a rapid sequence of household goods; a hand touches a multi-colored patterned memory foam floor mat displayed on a shelf. The scene shifts quickly to a large blue hardshell suitcase with a textured surface, followed by black winter gloves packaged in yellow boxes, all under bright fluorescent lighting. (3) The showcase continues with portable heaters and stainless steel warming units stacked in their retail packaging; a hand points toward the price tags. Small red electronic hand warmers are shown in a row, followed by black garden hose reels and boxes of Japanese-made mosquito repellent sheets, maintaining a fast-paced visual rhythm. (4) Decorative items and toys appear next, including a large ceramic-style Christmas bear statue wearing a green sweater and a set of Disney princess dolls in pink and yellow dresses. Blue and white umbrellas are displayed in vertical bins, and a hand lifts a white 10kg adjustable dumbbell from its box on a lower shelf. (5) Personal care products like Bioderma cleansing water in large bottles and boxes of Australian botanical soap are highlighted; the background reveals other shoppers in casual attire. Skincare sets including Strivectin serum and CNP ampoules are shown in close-up, followed by Hada Labo bottles and SU:M37 cream jars, each centered in the frame. (6) The focus shifts to bedding with white Hotel Grand comforters in plastic packaging and ergonomic pillows; the textures of the fabric are clearly visible. Floral printed duvet sets and animal-shaped triangular cushions in pink and grey are touched by a hand to demonstrate softness, while cooling mats and furry round cushions are stacked nearby. (7) Apparel items conclude the sequence, featuring wide-brimmed sun hats in various neutral colors and Nautica leather belts in white display boxes. Black Palladium boots and Puma athletic shoes are shown on their respective boxes, followed by black flip-flops and various quilted vests from New Balance and Hawke & Co laid out on tables. (8) Final items include stacks of embroidered kitchen towels in green and yellow patterns, followed by larger bath towels and plush rabbit-themed baby blanket sets. The video ends with a showcase of KitchenAid oven mitts, soft baby blankets, and luxury organic bedding sets, all filmed with a steady handheld camera in the warehouse environment.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main creator (hands visible), approximately 5 shoppers in the background at various intervals.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Only the hands of the main creator are visible, appearing to be a light-skinned adult touching or pointing at products.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The background consists of a large, high-ceilinged warehouse (Costco) with industrial metal shelving, large pallet stacks of goods, bright fluorescent overhead lighting, and concrete floors. Aisles are wide and filled with various retail categories from electronics to apparel.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a high-energy, fast-paced electronic dance track characterized by a steady 4/4 drum beat and bright synthesizers. A male narrator immediately begins speaking at an extremely high speech rate, his voice full of excitement and high arousal as he announces a Black Friday sale. (2) As the visuals cut rapidly, the narrator's voice remains constant but exhibits frequent pitch shifts to emphasize different brand names and price points. The background music maintains a consistent tempo and volume, providing a driving energy that matches the fast visual transitions between various household products and toys. (3) In the middle section, the narrator continues his rapid-fire delivery without significant pauses, listing prices and discounts with clear articulation despite the speed. Subtle whoosh sound effects accompany some of the faster visual transitions, while the underlying music remains upbeat and major-key, sustaining a positive and urgent promotional atmosphere. (4) Toward the end, the vocal intensity stays high, concluding with a final call to action or a summary of the deals. The music remains continuous throughout the entire 90 seconds, overlapping perfectly with the voice track, and ends abruptly with a final percussive beat as the narrator finishes his sentence.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To provide a comprehensive and rapid-fire overview of 'Black Friday' discounts at Costco, encouraging viewers to visit the store during the sale period by highlighting specific price drops on a wide variety of goods.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Detailed price comparisons, brand callouts, and 'Black Friday' promotion context.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video is a typical social-media style shopping guide with high information density, designed to grab attention through fast cuts and energetic narration.
